title: Sanji Feeds a Starving Enemy
description: On pages 4–6, Sanji feeds Gin despite the danger, revealing that his compassion for the hungry matters more to him than restaurant rules or pirate labels.
scene: Gin arrives broken and starving, while the Baratie cooks judge him as an enemy; Sanji alone treats hunger as something that must be answered.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: This is gender discrimination! I'll sue, you love-crazy cook!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I already gave you some tea! You could at least say a word of thanks for that, punk!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What!? You wanna start something, is that it!? I ain't gonna go easy on you! Geti'm, Zoro!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Get him your- self...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: MMM, DELICIOUS!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You haven't even cleared away my plates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But you still have mushrooms left! Finish it!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I left them on purpose because I hate mushrooms. I was poisoned by one when I was a kid.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well this one ain't poisoned so eat up, long-nose!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please don't fight just because of me.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: anything for you, miss!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Just who the hell's fighting for you!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: By the way, Mr. Cook.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: The food here's just a tad too expensive for me.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Then it shall be free of charge to you, Miss!

dialogue.speaker: Gin
dialogue.text: Thank you so much!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're paying though!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're a real witch, aren't ya...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ah, this tea's great.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: You fellas better watch out too.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ah, Sanji! It's been awhile.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Ah, good to see you again, Roxanne!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Gimme my fruit cup, you bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Damn letch.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, errand-boy! The hell are you sitting around and drinking tea for!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: PFT!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Bring out the hot towels when the customers come in.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yessir.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Z days later

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A surprising incident takes place

summary: This part reveals the core of Sanji’s morality: no matter who a person is, he cannot ignore someone starving in front of him.
